nodes.label: Workshop Kanban Dashboard
nodes.rationale: Active vehicles are grouped into one column per active repair process so workshop status is visible at a glance.

nodes.label: Dashboard Auto Refresh Interval
nodes.rationale: The dashboard refreshes every 30 seconds to keep operational state consistent with database changes.

nodes.label: Vehicle Time Status Color Coding
nodes.rationale: Green, amber, and red status colors communicate on-time, near-deadline, and overdue vehicles.

nodes.label: Duration Formatting Display
nodes.rationale: Elapsed and remaining minutes are formatted into readable durations for operational scanning.

nodes.label: Authentication Gate
nodes.rationale: The login screen is shown before other views and emits a success signal that lets the main window replace it with the full UI.

nodes.label: Role Based Navigation
nodes.rationale: Navigation items are hidden or shown according to the current user's role: insurance viewers see insurance, mechanics see dashboard, and managers/admins see broader features.

nodes.label: Insurer Scoped Findings
nodes.rationale: The insurance dashboard is scoped to the insurer associated with the logged-in user so vehicles from other companies are not visible.

nodes.label: Pending Findings KPI
nodes.rationale: A KPI label shows the count of pending findings and is refreshed after each action.

nodes.label: Finding Report Form
nodes.rationale: Mechanics record additional damage with description, estimated cost, optional photo, and active process traceability.

nodes.label: AI Cost Estimator Placeholder
nodes.rationale: A disabled cost-estimator button reserves a future Phase 7 AI integration point.

nodes.label: Vehicle Registration Form
nodes.rationale: The registration dialog captures customer, vehicle, crash severity, and optional insurance details before checking the vehicle into Reception.

nodes.label: Crash Severity Routing
nodes.rationale: Crash severity LOW versus HIGH is collected at intake and implies different repair pipeline routing.

nodes.label: Postgres Docker Compose Profile
nodes.rationale: Postgres and pgAdmin are optional services under the postgres profile for later migration or integration testing.

nodes.label: Agent Coordination Rules
nodes.rationale: The implementation plan and repo are the single source of truth; changes need docstrings, useful type hints, tests for new core logic, translatable UI strings, and soft-delete/audit behavior.

nodes.label: Findings SLA Metrics
nodes.rationale: Reporting is expected to compute finding lifecycle metrics from reported to acknowledged to approved.

nodes.label: Role Based Access Enforcement
nodes.rationale: Security owns hardening of role-based access enforcement points and session-sensitive actions.

nodes.label: Severity Class Cost Range Confidence Outputs
nodes.norm_label: severity class cost range confidence outputs

nodes.label: Services Do Not Import UI Code
nodes.norm_label: services do not import ui code

nodes.label: No Obvious Front Exterior Damage Visible
nodes.norm_label: no obvious front exterior damage visible

nodes.norm_label: stylized render rather than real inspection photo
